channel.title: Astro Themes by Whono
channel.description: A showcase site for an Astro theme: lightweight, maintainable, reusable.

item.title: Content Console Usage Guide
item.description: Covers the content types, list search, edit preview, and download/delete capabilities of the astro-whono local Content Console in the development environment.

item.title: Theme Console Configuration Guide
item.description: Covers the scope, page groups, storage targets, and save mechanism of the astro-whono local Theme Console in the development environment.

item.title: Admin Console Quick Guide
item.description: Introduces the entry points and per-page features of the astro-whono local Admin Console.

item.title: Markdown Formatting Guide
item.description: Demonstrates every Markdown format effect the theme supports, including headings, lists, code, tables, quotes, and more.

item.title: Building a Modern Web Application with Astro
item.description: A comprehensive guide to creating fast, content-focused websites

item.title: Code Highlighting Test
item.description: Tests syntax highlighting across different programming languages.
